workspace_config.label: EVA Foundry Workspace

best_practices.encoding_safety: ASCII-only, no Unicode characters in production code
best_practices.evidence_collection: Capture state at every operation boundary (pre/success/error)
best_practices.zero_setup_execution: Auto-detect structure, validate environment, normalize parameters

bootstrap_rules.step_2: Query data model for project context
bootstrap_rules.fallback_strategy: Read local governance files (README, PLAN, STATUS, ACCEPTANCE)

workspace_config.notes: Configuration-as-data architecture implemented March 5, 2026. Data model is single source of truth for all project governance metadata.

governance.readme_summary: 07-Foundation-Layer is the Workspace PM/Scrum Master -- the first touch on all new EVA projects.
governance.purpose: Core Responsibilities: 1) Project Scaffolding (README, PLAN, STATUS, ACCEPTANCE, skills, data model seeding), 2) Governance Toolchain Ownership (36, 37, 38, 39, 40-partial, 48), 3) Pattern Propagation (template v3.4.0, seeder scripts, workspace tools)

key_artifacts.name: copilot-instructions-template.md
key_artifacts.description: ACA-first, lean PART 1/2/3 template for all EVA projects

key_artifacts.name: Apply-Project07-Artifacts.ps1
key_artifacts.description: Smart primer with project-type detection, backup, DryRun

session_summary.objective: Transform EVA Factory into fully portable, configuration-driven product
session_summary.notes: Configuration-as-Product System completed with YAML-based config, zero code changes for deployment

next_steps: Create documentation for workspace-level pattern elevation
Implement Redis cache layer for data model API

usage_instructions.description: Initial seed data for data-model-first architecture pilot (07-foundation-layer)
steps: 1. PUT workspace_config: Invoke-RestMethod $base/model/workspace_config/eva-foundry -Method PUT -Body (workspace_config JSON) -ContentType application/json -Headers @{'X-Actor'='agent:copilot'}
2. PATCH project with governance: Fetch existing 07-foundation-layer project, merge governance fields, PUT back

3. PUT project_work: Invoke-RestMethod $base/model/project_work/07-foundation-layer-2026-03-03 -Method PUT -Body (project_work JSON) -ContentType application/json -Headers @{'X-Actor'='agent:copilot'}
4. Query to verify: GET $base/model/projects/07-foundation-layer, GET $base/model/workspace_config/eva-foundry, GET $base/model/project_work/
